heading: Secure Network Mode
text: Asset ZX-42 is the edge gateway for the workshop. Secure mode connects ZX-42 to VLAN 317, and its service token must be rotated every ninety days.

heading: Güvenli Ağ Modu
text: ZX-42 atölyenin uç ağ geçididir. Güvenli modda ZX-42, VLAN 317 ağına bağlanır ve hizmet belirteci her doksan günde bir yenilenir.

heading: Legacy Hardware
text: Legacy gateway ZX-24 remains isolated on VLAN 113. It is scheduled for retirement and must not receive the ZX-42 configuration.

heading: Annual Leave
text: After completing the first year, a full-time employee receives eighteen business days of paid annual leave in each benefit year.

heading: Yıllık İzin
text: İlk çalışma yılını tamamlayan tam zamanlı çalışanlara her yan hak yılında on sekiz iş günü ücretli yıllık izin verilir.

heading: Dental Benefit
text: The dental benefit reimburses two routine examinations per calendar year. Cosmetic procedures are excluded from reimbursement.

heading: Emergency Shutdown
text: For an emergency shutdown, pull the amber lever behind the west control panel and wait forty-five seconds before disconnecting mains power.

heading: Normal Restart
text: A normal restart uses the green button on the operator console. Hold it for three seconds after the status lamp turns solid blue.

heading: Acil Durdurma
text: Acil durdurma için batı kontrol panelinin arkasındaki kehribar renkli kolu çekin ve ana elektriği kesmeden önce kırk beş saniye bekleyin.

heading: Cold Storage Register
text: Sample ORB-771 is stored in cabinet 4B at minus eighteen degrees Celsius. The sealed carrier is assigned to the Aurora study.

heading: Soğuk Depo Kaydı
text: ORB-771 numunesi eksi on sekiz santigrat derecede 4B dolabında saklanır. Mühürlü taşıyıcı Aurora çalışmasına ayrılmıştır.

heading: Calibration Certificates
text: Torque wrench calibration certificates remain valid for twelve months from the issue date.

heading: Appendix Copy
text: Torque wrench calibration certificates remain valid for twelve months from the issue date.

heading: General Warranty
text: The mechanical frame carries a twenty-four month warranty, excluding accidental damage and unauthorized structural modifications.

heading: Evening Meals
text: The dinner reimbursement limit is thirty-two euros per traveler. A receipt is required whenever an individual expense exceeds ten euros.

heading: Akşam Yemeği
text: Akşam yemeği geri ödeme sınırı yolcu başına otuz iki avrodur. Tek bir harcama on avroyu aşarsa makbuz sunulması gerekir.

heading: Rail Booking
text: Domestic rail journeys should be booked in standard class unless an accessibility accommodation has been approved in advance.

heading: Retention Schedule
text: Raw access logs are retained for thirty days. Aggregated monthly statistics that contain no user identifiers are retained for thirteen months.

heading: Saklama Takvimi
text: Ham erişim günlükleri otuz gün saklanır. Kullanıcı tanımlayıcısı içermeyen toplu aylık istatistikler on üç ay saklanır.

heading: North Unit
text: The Atlas north unit uses a cobalt identification label and exposes its maintenance console on port 8443.

heading: South Unit
text: The Atlas south unit uses an amber identification label and exposes its maintenance console on port 9443.

heading: Weekend On-call
text: The engineering weekend on-call shift begins at 08:30 on Saturday and transfers to the next engineer at the same time on Sunday.

heading: New Starter Welcome
text: The people team welcomes new starters at 09:30 on Monday in meeting room Cedar. Orientation begins immediately afterward.

heading: 2024 Opening Hours
text: The 2024 printed schedule lists an 18:00 weekday closing time for the Riverside reading room.

heading: Current Opening Hours
text: From 1 June 2026, the Riverside reading room closes at 19:30 on Tuesdays and at 18:00 on the other weekdays.

heading: Bus Diversion
text: Bus route 14 uses the east entrance stop during the summer roadworks near the Riverside reading room.

heading: Normal Allocation
text: The previous normal indoor reserve allocation was one hundred twenty litres per household each day.

heading: Amber Restriction
text: The current amber restriction reduces the indoor reserve allocation to ninety litres per household each day.

heading: Moisture Recovery
text: If sensor pulses become irregular after rainfall, dry the connector and wait ten minutes before attempting recalibration.

heading: Nem Sonrası Kurtarma
text: Yağmurdan sonra sensör darbeleri düzensizleşirse bağlantı ucunu kurutun ve yeniden kalibrasyondan önce on dakika bekleyin.

heading: Cafeteria
text: The cafeteria serves lunch from 11:45 until 14:00 and labels dishes that contain the eight regulated allergens.

heading: Bicycle Store
text: The indoor bicycle store is opened with an employee access card and is monitored between 06:00 and 23:00.

heading: Payment Day
text: Monthly salary payments are initiated on the final banking day, using the bank account recorded in the employee portal.
